findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B missing document now 14 days overdue
findings.detail: SPRINT-2026-05-B has been referenced as the solution to the Sprint-A planning gap since 2026-05-21 (14 days as of 2026-06-03). STATUS.md correctly flags it as a hard blocker. No SPRINT-B document exists in the repo. Without it, AI workers have no work queue and all milestone progress is frozen. Requires human decision (Sebastian/Esme) to scope and create SPRINT-2026-05-B.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian must create SPRINT-2026-05-B.md with realistic capacity and scope. Agent cannot invent sprint scope.

findings.title: KPI.md OKR KR2 deadline 2026-05-27 is missed, still marked at-risk
findings.detail: KPI.md marks OKR KR2 as 'at-risk' with DUE 2026-05-27. As of 2026-06-03 (7 days past deadline), this is definitively MISSED. KR3 and KR4 also depend on KR2. Requires human decision on how to update OKR targets for the new timeline.
findings.fix_sketch: KPI.md needs human update: flip KR2/KR3/KR4 to MISSED with note, or set new deadlines with justification. Agent cannot invent new OKR targets.

findings.title: KPI.md KR4 and ROADMAP.md M-018 deadlines expire 2026-06-04 (tomorrow) with no progress
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md and KPI.md KR4 both target 2026-06-04 for Discord 8am digest (M-018). As of 2026-06-03, no progress exists on M-018 or its prerequisites M-015. These deadlines will be missed tomorrow. Requires human decision on revised dates.
findings.fix_sketch: Human must update ROADMAP.md and KPI.md dates for M-018/KR4 to reflect realistic completion timeline after SPRINT-B is scoped.

findings.title: STATUS.md in-flight section stale — audit/nightly-2026-05-30 merged long ago
findings.detail: STATUS.md listed 'audit/nightly-2026-05-30 — push pending for this session' as in-flight. That branch was merged on 2026-05-30 (4+ days ago). The stale entry and outdated SPRINT-B overdue count (day 9 → actually day 14) were misleading the next agent about current work state.
findings.fix_sketch: Cleared stale push-pending in-flight entry. Updated STATUS.md with 2026-06-03 audit session entry and corrected SPRINT-B overdue count to day 14.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md reviewer enforcement note (false positive — already present)
findings.detail: Initial scan flagged DECISIONS.md as missing a reviewer enforcement note. On verification, line 15 of DECISIONS.md already contains: 'Reviewers: reject any ADR PR that omits the DECISIONS.md update.' No fix needed.
findings.fix_sketch: No fix needed — already present in DECISIONS.md line 15.
